message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U7-C1",
      "title": "Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter",
      "description": "Understanding the photoelectric effect and wave-particle duality in matter.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain the experimental evidence for the particle nature of light through the photoelectric effect.",
        "Describe the concept of de Broglie wavelength associated with moving particles.",
        "Analyze the relationship between photon energy, work function, and stopping potential."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–VII Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter",
      "chapter_name": "Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U8-C1",
      "title": "Atoms",
      "description": "Exploring atomic models, electron orbits, and spectral emission series.",
      "competencies": [
        "Evaluate the limitations of Rutherford's model and explain Bohr's postulates for hydrogen atom stability.",
        "Derive expressions for orbital radii and energy levels in the hydrogen atom.",
        "Classify different spectral series (Lyman, Balmer, Paschen) based on electron transitions."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VIII Atoms and Nuclei",
      "chapter_name": "Atoms"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U8-C2",
      "title": "Nuclei",
      "description": "Investigating nuclear composition, binding energy, and radioactive processes.",
      "competencies": [
        "Calculate mass defect and binding energy per nucleon to explain nuclear stability.",
        "Differentiate between nuclear fission and fusion mechanisms and their respective applications in energy production.",
        "Analyze the laws of radioactivity including decay constants and half-life calculations."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-VIII Atoms and Nuclei",
      "chapter_name": "Nuclei"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U9-C1",
      "title": "Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits",
      "description": "Studying semiconductor properties, device characteristics, and logic gate operations.",
      "competencies": [
        "Distinguish between intrinsic and extrinsic semiconductors based on doping types (n-type/p-type).",
        "Interpret the V-I characteristics of p-n junction diodes in forward and reverse bias conditions.",
        "Design simple circuits using transistors as amplifiers or switches and analyze logic gate combinations."
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–IX Electronic Devices",
      "chapter_name": "Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits"
    }
  ]
}
